ucs.title: [LLM] Star Blizzard (SEABORGIUM/COLDRIVER) AitM session cookie theft & replay via EvilGinx-style proxy
ucs.description: Hunts the actor's signature credential-harvesting chain: impersonation email -> click to a lookalike Proton/Outlook/OneDrive credential page hosted on a reverse-proxy -> successful interactive sign-in -> the captured session cookie immediately replayed from a hosting/VPS ASN to access M365 mail and Graph. This is COLDRIVER/Callisto's primary intrusion path against NGO, gov, academic, and think-tank targets in NATO countries.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as first_click max(_time) as last_click values(Web.url) as urls values(Web.src) as click_src from datamodel=Web where (Web.url="*proton*" OR Web.url="*-share.*" OR Web.url="*docs-view*" OR Web.url="*cloud-share*" OR Web.url="*secureshare*" OR Web.url="*onedrive-*" OR Web.url="*office365-*") AND (Web.url="*.top/*" OR Web.url="*.click/*" OR Web.url="*.live/*" OR Web.url="*.cloud/*" OR Web.url="*.online/*" OR Web.url="*.info/*") by Web.user Web.dest
| rename Web.user as user Web.dest as phish_host
| join type=inner user [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count values(Authentication.src) as auth_src values(Authentication.app) as app values(Authentication.signature) as auth_evt from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success AND Authentication.app IN ("office365","azuread","exchange","graph") by Authentication.user Authentication.session_id _time span=1m
    | rename Authentication.user as user Authentication.session_id as session_id
    | stats values(auth_src) as src_list values(app) as apps min(_time) as first_auth max(_time) as last_auth dc(auth_src) as src_count by user session_id
    | where src_count>=2
]
| eval delta=last_auth-first_click
| where delta>=0 AND delta<=1800
| lookup asn_lookup ip as src_list OUTPUTNEW asn_type as src_asn_type
| search src_asn_type="hosting" OR src_asn_type="vps" OR src_asn_type="datacenter"
| table user phish_host urls session_id src_list apps first_click last_auth
| sort - last_auth
ucs.kql:
let lookalikes = dynamic(["proton","protondrive","docs-view","docs-share","cloud-share","secureshare","onedrive-","office365-","sharefile-","-share."]);
let suspiciousTlds = dynamic([".top",".click",".live",".cloud",".online",".info",".icu"]);
let clicks = UrlClickEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where Url has_any (lookalikes) and Url has_any (suspiciousTlds)
| where ActionType in ("ClickAllowed","UrlScanInProgress","ClickPending")
| project ClickTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn=tolower(AccountUpn), PhishUrl=Url, NetworkMessageId, IPAddress;
let successfulSignIn = AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where ErrorCode == 0
| where IsInteractive == true
| project AuthTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn=tolower(AccountUpn), SessionId, AuthIP=IPAddress, AuthCountry=Country, AuthUA=UserAgent, AuthASN=tostring(parse_json(NetworkLocationDetails));
let replay = AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where ErrorCode == 0
| where ResourceDisplayName has_any ("Office 365 Exchange Online","Microsoft Graph","OneDrive","SharePoint")
| where AuthenticationRequirement == "singleFactorAuthentication" or IsInteractive == false
| project ReplayTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn=tolower(AccountUpn), SessionId, ReplayIP=IPAddress, ReplayCountry=Country, ReplayUA=UserAgent, ReplayApp=ResourceDisplayName;
clicks
| join kind=inner successfulSignIn on AccountUpn
| where AuthTime between (ClickTime .. ClickTime + 30m)
| join kind=inner replay on AccountUpn, SessionId
| where ReplayTime between (AuthTime .. AuthTime + 12h)
| where ReplayIP != AuthIP and (ReplayCountry != AuthCountry or ReplayUA != AuthUA)
| extend HostingASN = ReplayIP matches regex @"^(45\.|185\.|193\.|212\.|5\.|95\.|31\.)"
| project AccountUpn, ClickTime, PhishUrl, AuthTime, AuthIP, AuthCountry, ReplayTime, ReplayIP, ReplayCountry, ReplayApp, SessionId, HostingASN
| sort by ReplayTime desc
ucs.rationale: COLDRIVER/SEABORGIUM is documented by Microsoft MSTIC, NCSC, CISA and Google TAG as building bespoke EvilGinx-style reverse proxies on NameCheap/Porkbun lookalike domains targeting Proton/M365 to defeat MFA via cookie theft. The combination (lookalike click -> success interactive auth -> same SessionId reappearing from a different VPS/ASN within hours) is far more specific to this actor than gener

ucs.title: [LLM] Star Blizzard post-compromise inbox rule + mass mail collection on academic/NGO/gov tenants
ucs.description: Hunts SEABORGIUM/Callisto's hallmark second-stage activity once a session is hijacked: the operator logs into OWA/Graph from a Proton/VPS IP, creates a hidden auto-forwarding or move-to-RSS-Feeds rule on the victim's mailbox, and bulk-pulls historical mail (T1114.002) to Proton-hosted dead-drops. This catches the actor's persistent espionage objective rather than the initial phish.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count values(All_Changes.object_attrs) as rule_attrs values(All_Changes.src) as src values(All_Changes.user_agent) as ua min(_time) as _time from datamodel=Change.All_Changes where All_Changes.action=created AND (All_Changes.object_category="InboxRule" OR All_Changes.command IN ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","New-TransportRule")) by All_Changes.user All_Changes.object
| rename All_Changes.user as user All_Changes.object as rule_name
| search rule_attrs="*ForwardTo*" OR rule_attrs="*RedirectTo*" OR rule_attrs="*MoveToFolder*RSS*" OR rule_attrs="*DeletedItems*" OR rule_attrs="*Archive*" OR rule_attrs="*proton*" OR rule_attrs="*tutanota*" OR rule_attrs="*mail.ru*"
| join type=inner user [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count values(Authentication.src) as login_src values(Authentication.user_agent) as login_ua from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success AND Authentication.app IN ("exchange","office365","graph","owa") by Authentication.user _time span=10m
    | rename Authentication.user as user
]
| lookup asn_lookup ip as login_src OUTPUTNEW asn_type as login_asn org as login_org
| search login_asn IN ("hosting","vps","datacenter") OR login_org="*Proton*" OR login_org="*M247*" OR login_org="*Stark Industries*" OR login_org="*Hostinger*"
| append [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Email where Email.action=read OR Email.signature="MailItemsAccessed" by Email.recipient _time span=1h
    | rename Email.recipient as user
    | where count>200
]
| stats values(rule_name) as rules values(rule_attrs) as forwarding_target values(login_src) as login_ip values(login_org) as login_org max(count) as bulk_read_count by user
| where isnotnull(forwarding_target) AND isnotnull(login_ip)
ucs.kql:
let suspiciousFwdTargets = dynamic(["proton.me","protonmail.com","protonmail.ch","tutanota","mail.ru","yandex","@pm.me","@tuta.io"]);
let ruleOps = CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where Application in ("Microsoft Exchange Online","Office 365")
| where ActionType in ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules","New-TransportRule")
| extend Params = tostring(RawEventData)
| where Params has_any (suspiciousFwdTargets) 
     or Params has_any ("ForwardTo","RedirectTo","ForwardAsAttachmentTo")
     or Params has_any ("RSS Feeds","RSS Subscriptions","Conversation History","Deleted Items","Archive")
| project RuleTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn=tolower(AccountId), ActionType, Params, RuleIP=IPAddress;
let vpsLogins = AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where ErrorCode == 0
| where ResourceDisplayName has_any ("Exchange","Graph","Outlook")
| where NetworkLocationDetails has_any ("hosting","datacenter","vpn") 
     or ISP has_any ("Proton","M247","Stark Industries","Hostinger","Selectel","Aeza","DataCamp")
| project LoginTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn=tolower(AccountUpn), LoginIP=IPAddress, ISP, Country, UserAgent;
let bulkMailRead = CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where ActionType in ("MailItemsAccessed","Send","SearchQueryInitiatedExchange")
| summarize ItemCount=count(), FirstAccess=min(Timestamp), LastAccess=max(Timestamp) by AccountUpn=tolower(AccountId), bin(Timestamp, 1h)
| where ItemCount > 200;
ruleOps
| join kind=inner vpsLogins on AccountUpn
| where RuleTime between (LoginTime .. LoginTime + 2h)
| join kind=leftouter bulkMailRead on AccountUpn
| project AccountUpn, LoginTime, LoginIP, ISP, Country, RuleTime, ActionType, Params, ItemCount, UserAgent
| sort by RuleTime desc
ucs.rationale: CISA AA23-341A and Microsoft DEV-0270/SEABORGIUM reporting both call out that after stealing creds Star Blizzard pivots into OWA/Graph from Proton or commodity-VPS infrastructure, sets a forwarding/hide rule (often into RSS Feeds folder, a known Callisto tradecraft tell), and exfiltrates contacts and mail. The triple-correlation (VPS/Proton-ISP login + inbox-rule mutation with Proton/Tutanota targ
